metadata.description: Project name prefix for resource naming
Entra ID admin object ID for SQL Server
Entra ID admin login name for SQL Server
Entra ID admin principal type for SQL Server
Contact email for budget alerts and notifications
Deploy Functions and Event Grid (requires compute quota)
Log Analytics workspace ID for diagnostics
Log Analytics workspace ID for diagnostics
App Managed Identity principal ID for role assignment
Function Managed Identity principal ID for role assignment
Azure region for private endpoint (must match VNet region)
Log Analytics workspace ID for diagnostics
Entra ID admin principal type (User, Group, or Application)
Backend subnet ID for VNet integration
Functions subnet ID for VNet integration

appSettings.name: AzureWebJobsStorage
appSettings.value: [format('DefaultEndpointsProtocol=https;AccountName={0};AccountKey={1}', format('stfunc{0}{1}', replace(parameters('projectName'), '-', ''), parameters('environment')), listKeys(resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', format('stfunc{0}{1}', replace(parameters('projectName'), '-', ''), parameters('environment'))), '2023-05-01').keys[0].value)]

metadata.description: Function App ID for event subscription endpoint

properties.userMetadata: Splunk Add-on for Microsoft Cloud Services

inputs.name: Query
inputs.value: AppRequests | where TimeGenerated > ago(24h) | summarize count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 1h) | render timechart

inputs.name: Query
inputs.value: AppRequests | where TimeGenerated > ago(24h) | summarize percentile(DurationMs, 50), percentile(DurationMs, 95), percentile(DurationMs, 99) by bin(TimeGenerated, 5m) | render timechart

inputs.name: Query
inputs.value: AppExceptions | where TimeGenerated > ago(24h) | summarize count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 1h), ProblemId | render barchart

properties.description: [format('Assigns the NIST SP 800-53 Rev 5 regulatory compliance initiative for AssuranceNet {0}', parameters('environment'))]
